title: selaginella polyptera
intro: Selaginella polyptera, also known as the spikemoss or spike moss, is a type of ancient, non-vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. Traditionally, Selaginella polyptera has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and supporting the immune system. Selaginella polyptera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used to treat various health issues, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
